app.subtitle: Create, update, and manage your Palworld dedicated server without touching SteamCMD.
startup.migrate_text:
Settings from a previous version were found next to the launcher.

Copy them to the user data folder?
{0}

The original files are not deleted. Worlds and backups are untouched.
startup.corrupt_text:
The launcher settings file (launcher-settings.json) is corrupted and could not be read.

Default values will be used, including the server location: double-check it before saving.{0}
panel.metrics_empty: FPS: --   Players: --   Frame: -- ms   RAM: --   CPU: --
panel.metrics: FPS: {0}   Players: {1}   Frame: {2} ms   RAM: {3} GB   CPU: {4}
panel.quality_unexpected: Metrics received in an unexpected format
panel.security_note: REST API: local/LAN only. Do not expose the REST port to the Internet.
panel.announce_failed: Could not send the announcement via REST API.
config.name: Name
config.saved_msg: Settings saved. Restart the server to apply in-game changes.
config.options_read_error: Could not read launcher-settings.json; default values will be used.
schedule.warnings_note: Automatic warnings: 25, 15, and 10 minutes; then 9, 8, 7... down to 1 minute.
schedule.no_active: There is no active scheduled restart.
chat.note: Note: the vanilla Palworld server does not always print player chat to its output; if nothing shows up after restarting from the launcher, a logging mod (UE4SS) is required.
chat.send_failed: Could not send the message. Check REST API and admin password.
chat.title: Chat
players.title: Players
backups.title: Backups
backups.folder_error:
Could not open the backups folder:
{0}
restore.title: Restore backup
restore.stop_first: Stop the server before restoring a backup.
restore.unidentified:
A PalServer process is running that cannot be identified as belonging to this installation (another installation, or an elevated process?).

For safety, close it before restoring a backup.
restore.first_confirm:
This will replace the current Pal\Saved folder.

Continue?
restore.done:
Backup restored successfully.
A pre-restore safety copy was created.
server.already_running: The server is already running. PID: {0}
server.not_alive: PalServer launched, but the process did not stay running.
server.wrapper_error: Windows did not return the launcher process.
server.unidentified_start:
A PalServer process is running that cannot be identified as belonging to this installation.

If it actually is the server from THIS folder (started outside the launcher, or elevated), starting a second process can corrupt the world.

Start anyway?
server.rest_no_response: REST API did not respond; a forced shutdown will be used as fallback.
update.unidentified:
A PalServer process is running that cannot be identified as belonging to this installation.

If that process is using THIS server's files, the update may fail or leave it in an inconsistent state.

Continue anyway?
update.steamcmd_missing:
SteamCMD is not installed.

Download it now from Valve's official site?

It will be installed to:
{0}
auto.title: Automation
auto.no_messages: No messages available. Check the tips and custom messages files.
gemini.note: Optional feature, disabled by default: the AI is only used when you press Generate, never on its own. The key is protected by Windows for the current user, and the launcher works fine without it.
gemini.title: Gemini
gemini.added_activity: Gemini added {0} tips to the local file.
smart.only_empty: Only restart automatically when no players are online
smart.join_leave: Log joins and leaves in activity
smart.waiting_empty: Smart restart waiting for an empty server.
apitest.title: REST API diagnostics
game.restart_minutes: The server will restart in {0} minutes.
game.restart_one_minute: The server will restart in 1 minute.
game.restart_cancelled: The scheduled restart has been cancelled.
game.maintenance_restart: The server will restart for performance maintenance.
about.subtitle: Create, update, and manage your Palworld dedicated server without touching SteamCMD.
about.features:
• Automatic SteamCMD installation.
• Dedicated server install and updates.
• Server start, stop, and restart.
• Backups and restore.
• Quick server configuration.
• Multi-language support.
• Ready for updates from GitHub.
about.language_restart: The language is applied after reopening the launcher.
about.donate_text: If this launcher saved you time, you can support Firebrand Software to keep improving it.
about.license: MIT License — free, modifiable, and easy to share.
wizard.title: Setup wizard
wizard.welcome: How do you want to set up your Palworld dedicated server?
wizard.opt_new: Install a NEW server with SteamCMD (recommended)
wizard.opt_new_desc: Downloads SteamCMD and the official server from Steam into a folder you choose. You don't need Steam installed.
wizard.opt_existing: Use a server ALREADY installed on this PC
wizard.opt_existing_desc: Pick the folder of an existing Palworld Dedicated Server install: the launcher manages it without reinstalling or touching anything.
wizard.new_folder_label: Folder where the server will be installed:
wizard.existing_not_found: PalServer.exe was not found in that folder (neither directly nor in server\). Pick a dedicated server folder.
wizard.folder_has_server:
That folder already contains a Palworld server.

Do you want the launcher to use it as-is (without reinstalling)?
wizard.firewall: Create the Windows Firewall rule for the UDP port (asks for administrator permissions)
wizard.installing: Installing… watch the SteamCMD window: the server is several GB and may take several minutes.
wizard.steamcmd_exit: SteamCMD exited with code {0} and the server was not installed. Check the SteamCMD window and try again.
wizard.admin_required: Enter an admin/API password: without it the launcher cannot stop or manage the server.
wizard.firewall_failed: Could not create the firewall rule (did you cancel the admin prompt?). You can create it later.
wizard.installed_activity: Server installed by the wizard at {0}.
updater.uptodate: You already have the latest version ({0}).
updater.available: A new launcher version is available: {0} (installed: {1}).
updater.no_asset: Release {0} has no installer attached; opening the GitHub page so you can download it manually.
updater.starting_install:
The installer will open and the launcher will close.

Your worlds, backups and settings are NOT touched.
updater.git_confirm:
Run git pull in the launcher folder?

{0}
schedule.waiting_empty: Scheduled restart: waiting for the server to be empty ({0} online)...
